speaker: speaker1
text: What do you mean ? If he was a good programmer , he should have been raking it in .

speaker: speaker2
text: The boss wanted to pay Bob with stock options . But Bob didn't want to play that game again .

speaker: speaker2
text: At his last start-up , Bob worked for stock and no salary . They folded and he made zip .

speaker: speaker2
text: Now he only works freelance . Hundred bucks an hour .
